notes: P64 defines candidate index records only. It does not implement runtime candidate storage, persistent candidate storage, promotion runtime, public search candidate injection, source cache mutation, evidence ledger mutation, probe queue mutation, local index mutation, master-index mutation, telemetry, public query logging, external calls, or live probes.
Candidate records are provisional, reviewable, and conflict-preserving. They are not accepted evidence, public result authority, or master-index truth.

P65 defines candidate promotion assessment policy as contract-only and adds no promotion runtime, automatic acceptance, candidate-index mutation, source-cache mutation, evidence-ledger mutation, public-index mutation, local-index mutation, master-index mutation, external calls, or live probes.
P66 Known Absence Page v0 is future/contract-only and does not add runtime pages, telemetry, probes, or mutation.

P67 Query Privacy and Poisoning Guard v0 is future/contract-only and adds no runtime guard, telemetry, account/IP tracking, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes.
P68 demand dashboard remains future/contract-only and may use only privacy-filtered, poisoning-guarded aggregate inputs; no runtime aggregation, telemetry, real demand claim, or mutation is added.
P69 source sync workers remain future/contract-only; no public-query fanout, connector runtime, source cache/evidence ledger mutation, candidate mutation, or index mutation is added.
P70 source cache/evidence ledger remains future/contract-only and does not mutate query-intelligence records.
